---
title: Maths Sheets
listing:
  contents: "worksheets/*.qmd"
  exclude: "worksheets/index.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, date, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  sort: 
    - date desc
---

# Maths Sheets

Collection of auto-generated math worksheets for tutoring.

Browse all available worksheets below, sorted by date. Click on any title to view the full worksheet.

**To print:** Open the worksheet and use **Ctrl+P** (or **Cmd+P** on Mac) to print to PDF or paper.
